scripts.deploy:assets:dev: node -e "const { execSync } = require('child_process'); execSync('aws s3 sync out s3://noteship-web-dev --delete', { stdio: 'inherit' }); const id = execSync('aws cloudformation describe-stacks --stack-name NoteshipWeb-dev --query \"Stacks[0].Outputs[?OutputKey==\\\'WebDistributionId\\\'].OutputValue\" --output text', { encoding: 'utf8' }).trim(); if (!id) { throw new Error('WebDistributionId not found on NoteshipWeb-dev stack'); } execSync('aws cloudfront create-invalidation --distribution-id ' + id + ' --paths \"/*\"', { stdio: 'inherit' });"
scripts.test: node -e "if (!process.env.RUN_E2E) { console.log('Skipping E2E (set RUN_E2E=1 to enable)'); process.exit(0); } require('child_process').execSync('playwright test', { stdio: 'inherit' });"
